page.title: Confirm your payment
page.notFoundBody: The link you opened doesn't match any active payment session. If you arrived here from an email or a message, go back and try again.
page.expiredBody: The window to complete this payment has closed. Ask the merchant for a new link.

COMPLETED.title: Payment completed
COMPLETED.body: This session has already been charged. If you think that's a mistake, contact the merchant.

EXPIRED.title: Session expired
EXPIRED.body: The window to complete this payment has closed.

CANCELED.title: Session canceled
CANCELED.body: The merchant canceled this payment session.

methods.title: Payment method
methods.noneAvailable: No payment methods are available for this session. Contact the merchant.
methods.flowNotImplemented: The {flow} flow is not available in this checkout yet.

redirect.redirectHint: We'll send you to the provider's secure page to complete the charge.
